title: Link-Bearing Elements, Base URLs, Relations, Discovery, and Scheduling · Runtime Lens: Base Url Precedence
summary: The crawler follows canonical, alternate, preload, form, script, mailto, and base-altered references as if every discovered URL were a navigational page. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the base url precedence increment in typed link-discovery record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Apply effective response URL and the first valid HTML base element deliberately and retain both source and resolved references.
Extract navigational, embedded, form, metadata, refresh, and structured-data URLs by element and attribute with distinct policies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-link-discovery-relations-2
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-link-discovery-relations-2.
# Case 7417: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def worked_scraper_link_discovery_relations_2(raw_references: int = 36, resolved_references: int = 34, scheduled_pages: int = 18, rejected_references: int = 16, unexplained_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorizationworked2",
        "url7417",
        "response2dekrow",
        "treeworked27417",
        "frontier7417worked2",
        "report2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if raw_references < 1 or resolved_references < 0:
        return False, resolved_references, "link-count"
    if resolved_references > raw_references:
        return False, resolved_references, "resolution-accounting"
    if scheduled_pages + rejected_references != resolved_references:
        return False, scheduled_pages, "admission-reconciliation"
    if unexplained_decisions > 0:
        return False, unexplained_decisions, "link-provenance"
    assert scheduled_pages + rejected_references == resolved_references
    return True, scheduled_pages, "typed-link-discovery"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-base-url-precedence-vn4nt8
# Competency: scraper-base-url-precedence.
# Case 7323: a clean package and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def evidence_scraper_base_url_precedence_vn4nt8(raw_references: int = 36, resolved_references: int = 34, scheduled_pages: int = 18, rejected_references: int = 16, unexplained_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_vn4nt8 = "vn4nt8-8tn4nv-7323"
    assert evidence_variant_vn4nt8
    evidence_axes_vn4nt8 = (
        "authorizationvn4nt8",
        "url7323",
        "response8tn4nv",
        "treevn4nt87323",
        "frontier7323vn4nt8",
        "report8tn4nv7323",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_vn4nt8)) == 6
    if raw_references < 1 or resolved_references < 0:
        return False, resolved_references, "link-count"
    if resolved_references > raw_references:
        return False, resolved_references, "resolution-accounting"
    if scheduled_pages + rejected_references != resolved_references:
        return False, scheduled_pages, "admission-reconciliation"
    if unexplained_decisions > 0:
        return False, unexplained_decisions, "link-provenance"
    assert scheduled_pages + rejected_references == resolved_references
    return True, scheduled_pages, "typed-link-discovery"

Write the theory evidence note for Base Url Precedence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 6799 during a privacy-minimized internal crawl. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate link types, base resolution, relation semantics, admission order, deduplication, and discovery provenance; automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance; then inject one retry, cancellation, queue, checkpoint, or output failure and recover cleanly. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply effective response URL and the first valid HTML base element deliberately and retain both source and resolved references.
